pool.baseline: everything is just so quiet now. i walk into the kitchen and i still expect to hear him making coffee or just... moving around. but it's just me. it feels like i'm just going through the motions of being alive but there's no one actually here. it's like i died too and i just haven't realized it yet. i don't see the point in any of it anymore.

pool.baseline: The candle flickers low, much like the guttering remains of my very soul. To be so utterly forsaken... to find that the heart I laid at their feet was nothing more than a stone to be cast aside... it is a cruelty too heavy for this mortal coil to bear. The silence of this manor is deafening, a shroud that waits to claim me. I feel as though I am already a ghost, haunting the ruins of a life that was never truly mine. There is no dawn left for me, only the soft, velvet embrace of the unending night.
